context.usage: Used during live play to show current score and high score in the top-right safe area.

shape.silhouette: Five-character horizontal number string using a 10x16 monospace grid.

acceptance_criteria: Rendered text shows 5 digits with 0 padding and right-aligned occupancy.
Top-left pixel of the mock sits at the 540,10 screen anchor when placed in the full frame.

reference_images.label: ui_layout_reference
reference_images.purpose: Score placement, game-over layout, and screen-safe margin anchor.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Pixel-art outline, low-detail silhouette, and monochrome contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: UiImage bundle for HUD and state overlays with deterministic anchors.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/art_000016.png through AssetServer and register the handle under art_000016.
runtime_notes: Keep source pixels unfiltered with nearest-neighbor sampling and integer world transforms.
Spawn order follows execution_order so downstream setup can validate deterministic asset availability.
Collision and UI code read logical dimensions from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata.
